rationale: Educ. Code §39.0543 governs school performance ratings and intervention triggers. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax revenue, or Tax Code §11.13. No textual conflict exists.
quote: A reference in law to an acceptable performance rating or acceptable performance includes an overall or domain performance rating of A, B, or C or performance that is exemplary, recognized, or acceptable.
_note: Rule text concerns accountability ratings only; no fiscal or tax provision implicated.
